COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Feb-27-2006 Case Settled - Set For Crc 525 Hearing On May-16-06 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 212
MINI MINUTES: This matter came regularly on calendar this day, by assignment from the Department of the Presiding Judge for Court Trial/Prove-Up.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Diana Padilla.
Lawrence Mann, Esq. for Plaintiff: Cheryl Green, also present, was sworn and direct examined.
No appearance by the Defendant: John Jolivetter, ind. & dba Jolivette Construction Co.
EXH. 1 - Accounting Work Report-------------------ID/EVID.
EXH. 2 - Profit & Loss by Job---------------------ID/EVID.
EXH. 3 - One Photo---------------------ID/EVID.
EXH. 4 - One Photo---------------------ID/EVID.
EXH. 5 - One Photo---------------------ID/EVID.
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against Defendant as follows:
Special Damages $201,501.00
Prejudgment Interest at 10% per year
Costs $264.50
Attorney's Fees $5,000.00.
Counsel stipulated for the return of Exhibits in open court and to prepare Judgment.
Matter is calendared for CRC-225 on May 16, 2006 at 10:00 A.M. in Dept. 212 for Dismissal, pending final settlement of Co-Defendant: Contractors State License Board.

11:55 A.M.
Judgment signed by Comm. Kaplan.
